factor name 1.description: This factor combines short-term price momentum with normalized volume growth to capture trend strength and market participation. It uses a 5-day momentum calculation and applies Z-score normalization to volume change to reduce noise and improve stability across different market conditions.

variables.$return: Daily return of the stock on that day
variables.$volume: Volume of the stock on that day
variables.TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 5): Percentage change in volume over the past 5 days
variables.TS_ZSCORE(TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 5), 20): Z-score of the 5-day volume percentage change over the past 20 days

factor name 2.description: This factor measures the cross-sectional rank of 5-day momentum relative to volume growth, providing a normalized signal of trend strength. It uses Z-score normalization on both momentum and volume to ensure stability and comparability across different market conditions and instruments.

variables.$return: Daily return of the stock on that day
variables.$volume: Volume of the stock on that day
variables.TS_MEAN($return, 5): Mean of daily returns over the past 5 days
variables.TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 5): Percentage change in volume over the past 5 days
variables.TS_ZSCORE(TS_MEAN($return, 5), 20): Z-score of 5-day momentum over the past 20 days
variables.TS_ZSCORE(TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 5), 20): Z-score of 5-day volume percentage change over the past 20 days
